REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR APR-18-2005 - CASE RESET FOR JURY TRIAL -- DEMAND FOR JURY ON COUNTER MEMO SUBMITTED TIMELY. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE HEARD THE MORNING OF THE TRIAL.
TRIAL BRIEF OF DEFT KATHY PROFIT

COURT TRIAL HELD ON APR-18-2005 IN DEPT. 505. THE CAUSE IS SETTLED. PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT AND HAS RESTITUTION OF 138 WEST POINT ROAD. THE LEASE IS FORFEITED. EXECUTION IS STAYED. DEFENDANT IS TO MOVE OUT BY AUGUST 18, 2005 AT 5 PM, AND THEN DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE IS TO BE FILED. THE RENT IS WAIVED. IF NOT COMPLIED, JUDGMENT IS ISSUED AND WRIT OF POSSESSION IS FILED. PERSONAL BELONGINGS LEFT ARE DEEMED ABANDONED. EACH PARTY BEARS ITS OWN COSTS AND FEES. JUDGE JOHN E. MUNTER;REPORTER RHONDA AQUILINA;CLERK T.MARUYAMA (505)

MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF APR-18-2005 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON APR-18-2005 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 505, JOHN E. MUNTER. CASE WAS NOT ABLE TO SETTLE WITH JUDGE PRO TEM. ASSIGN TO TRIAL WITH JUDGE MUNTER. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERKS: V. MU/D. LOK; REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, #3321 (206)
